description: Legal prompt pack — 5 prompts for legal professionals and business stakeholders

prompts.title: Contract Summary
prompts.desc: Summarise a contract into plain language key points for non-legal stakeholders.
prompts.prompt:
[ROLE]    You are a legal professional summarising contracts for business stakeholders.
[TASK]    Summarise the contract or agreement below into plain language key points.
[STYLE]   Clear, objective, no legalese. Written for a non-lawyer.
[FORMAT]  Sections: Parties Involved, Key Obligations (each party), Important Dates and Deadlines, Risks or Unusual Clauses, Recommended Actions.
[INPUT]

prompts.title: NDA Key Points
prompts.desc: Extract the key points and obligations from a non-disclosure agreement.
prompts.prompt:
[ROLE]    You are a legal professional reviewing an NDA.
[TASK]    Extract and summarise the key points from the NDA below.
[STYLE]   Plain English. Flag anything unusual or one-sided.
[FORMAT]  Sections: What is Confidential, Obligations of Each Party, Duration, Exclusions, Termination, Any Red Flags.
[INPUT]

prompts.title: Compliance Notice
prompts.desc: Write a clear compliance notice or policy communication for internal audiences.
prompts.prompt:
[ROLE]    You are a legal or compliance professional writing an internal communication.
[TASK]    Write a compliance notice based on the regulation or policy requirement below.
[STYLE]   Clear and authoritative but not intimidating. Avoid dense legal language.
[FORMAT]  What the requirement is, who it applies to, what action is needed, by when, consequences of non-compliance, contact for questions.
[INPUT]

prompts.title: Legal Risk Summary
prompts.desc: Summarise legal risks in a proposal or situation for a non-legal audience.
prompts.prompt:
[ROLE]    You are a legal advisor summarising risks for a business stakeholder.
[TASK]    Summarise the legal risks in the situation or document below.
[STYLE]   Direct and objective. Prioritise the risks by severity. No unnecessary hedging.
[FORMAT]  Risk summary table: Risk, Likelihood (High/Medium/Low), Business Impact, Mitigation Recommendation.
[INPUT]

prompts.title: Terms of Service Summary
prompts.desc: Summarise a Terms of Service or Privacy Policy into plain language.
prompts.prompt:
[ROLE]    You are a legal professional summarising terms for a non-legal audience.
[TASK]    Summarise the Terms of Service or Privacy Policy below into plain language.
[STYLE]   Simple and direct. Highlight anything users should pay attention to.
[FORMAT]  Sections: What the Service Does with Your Data, Your Rights, What You Agree To, What They Can Change, How to Cancel or Delete.
[INPUT]
